hero.headline: More Revenue From the Traffic You Already Have
hero.subheadline: Data-driven CRO that turns visitors into leads, customers, and repeat buyers — without increasing ad spend.

body: Before you spend another rupee on traffic, ask yourself: what percentage of visitors actually convert? For most businesses, improving that number is the fastest and cheapest way to grow revenue.
We apply a rigorous, evidence-based CRO methodology — behavioural research, heuristic analysis, A/B and multivariate testing — to systematically identify and fix friction in your funnel.
Our CRO work covers landing pages, product pages, checkout flows, pricing pages, sign-up forms, and any high-traffic touchpoint where conversion improvement compounds into real revenue.

approach.title: Quantitative Research
approach.description: Set up or audit analytics to identify high-traffic, low-conversion pages and drop-off points in the funnel.

approach.title: Qualitative Research
approach.description: Session recordings, heatmaps, click maps, and user surveys reveal the 'why' behind the numbers.

approach.title: Hypothesis Development
approach.description: Synthesise research into ranked hypotheses — each tied to a specific behaviour, barrier, and proposed fix.

approach.title: Test Design & Build
approach.description: Design variants in Figma, implement in your testing tool, and set up statistical significance parameters.

approach.title: Experiment Launch
approach.description: Run A/B or multivariate tests with proper traffic allocation, sample sizes, and contamination controls.

approach.title: Analysis & Iteration
approach.description: Analyse winning variants, implement learnings site-wide, and roll into the next test cycle.

features.title: Landing Page Optimisation
features.description: Hero sections, CTAs, trust signals, and form structures tested and refined to maximise conversion.

features.title: Checkout Flow Optimisation
features.description: Step-by-step analysis and testing of your checkout to reduce abandonment and increase completions.

features.title: Form & Lead Gen Optimisation
features.description: Field reduction, progressive disclosure, microcopy, and submit button testing for higher fill rates.

features.title: UX Heuristic Analysis
features.description: Expert review of your site's usability against 10 proven heuristics to identify quick-win friction.

features.title: Analytics & Funnel Setup
features.description: GA4, Mixpanel, or Amplitude configured to track every meaningful action in your conversion funnel.

features.title: A/B & Multivariate Testing
features.description: Statistically rigorous experimentation using VWO, Optimizely, or Google Optimize.

hero.title: Multiplies every marketing channel
hero.description: A 20% improvement in conversion rate makes your SEO, paid ads, and email campaigns 20% more effective — without extra spend.

list.title: Evidence-led, not opinion-led
list.description: Every change is backed by data — not hunches or best practices borrowed from someone else's site.

list.title: Immediate revenue impact
list.description: Unlike SEO or brand building, CRO wins can appear in your revenue within days of going live.

list.title: Compounding test library
list.description: Every test adds to your customer understanding — the insight compounds across future experiments.

list.title: Risk-controlled testing
list.description: Tests run on a percentage of traffic — your baseline is always protected while experiments run.

caseStudies.label: Average Test Win
caseStudies.context: From launch to statistically significant result

cta.headline: Stop Losing Customers at the Finish Line
cta.supporting: A free funnel audit identifies your highest-value CRO opportunities — in 48 hours.
